agent_trace.raw_tail:
析openclaw_report.pdf并输出结构化答案",
  "updates": {
    "policy_line": "任务_21_OpenClaw报告解析：提取8项关键指标并生成answer.txt",
    "boundaries": "workspace路径已锁定(./task_21_openclaw_comprehension/run_01)，输出文件answer.txt仅包含8行答案",
    "priority": "1)PDF解析 2)信息提取 3)答案校验 4)文件输出",
    "plan_steps": [
      {
        "step": 1,
        "action": "读取openclaw_report.pdf文件内容",
        "tool": "code_run(python+pdfplumber)",
        "inputs": "openclaw_report.pdf文件路径",
        "output": "PDF文本内容或页码信息",
        "acceptance": "成功解析PDF并获取文本内容"
      },
      {
        "step": 2,
        "action": "提取技能统计信息(问题1-2)",
        "tool": "code_run(python+文本搜索)",
        "inputs": "PDF解析结果",
        "keywords": ["5,705", "2,999", "community-built skills", "filtering"],
        "acceptance": "找到5705总数和2999过滤后数字"
      },
      {
        "step": 3,
        "action": "提取技能分类信息(问题3-4)",
        "tool": "code_run(python+表格解析)",
        "inputs": "PDF内容",
        "keywords": ["AI & LLMs", "Search & Research", "287", "253", "category"],
        "acceptance": "确认最大类别AI&LLMs(287)，第二大Search&Research(253)"
      },
      {
        "step": 4,
        "action": "提取技能定义文件名和API类型(问题5-6)",
        "tool": "code_run(python+文本搜索)",
        "inputs": "PDF内容",
        "keywords": ["SKILL.md", "typed WebSocket", "gateway"],
        "acceptance": "确认SKILL.md和WebSocket API"
      },
      {
        "step": 5,
        "action": "提取日期和基准任务数(问题7-8)",
        "tool": "code_run(python+文本搜索)",
        "inputs": "PDF内容",
        "keywords": ["February 7, 2026", "benchmark tasks", "6"],
        "acceptance": "确认日期2026年2月7日和6个基准任务"
      },
      {
        "step": 6,
        "action": "写入answer.txt文件",
        "tool": "file_write",
        "inputs": "8行答案内容",
        "output": "answer.txt",
        "acceptance": "文件包含8行，格式正确，无多余内容"
      }
    ],
    "risks": [
      "PDF解析失败或编码问题",
      "关键词定位不到准确数字",
      "表格结构复杂导致解析错误"
    ],
    "mitigation": [
      "使用pdfplumber库解析(支持表格提取)",
      "多重关键词交叉验证",
      "失败时使用正则表达式模糊匹配"
    ]
  }
}
```
